case_title: WILLIE TOOLE JR. et al VS. AUTORETURN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOOLE JR., WILLIE LIGON-TOOLE, SHAHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AUTORETURN ** SEE ATTACHED FOR JUDGMENT DETAILS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOOLE JR., WILLIE LIGON-TOOLE, SHAHN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-18-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AUTORETURN
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)
SMALL CLAIMS CLAIM CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2009 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - PARTIES WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM.
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2009 - ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIMS TRIAL COURT CALENDAR ON SEP-29-2009 AT 10:40 AM IN DEPT. 608, JUDGE CURTIS KARNOW. (206)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2009 BY CURTIS KARNOW. THIS MATTER COMES BEFORE THE COURT ON THIS DATE FOR A SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. JUDGE URTIS E.A. KARNOW, CLERK DENNIS D. VEGAS, THE PLAINTIFF WILLIE TODD AND SHAWN LIEGON, THE DEFENDANT DAN SCANLAN FOR AUTO RETURN, ARE PRESENT IN COURT. THE JUDGE SWEARS IN THE PARTIES AND BOTH SIDES GIVE TESTAMONY. BOTH SIDES PRESENT DOCUMENTS BUT JUDGE KARNOW DOES NOT WANT THEM MARKED. NO EXHIBITS WERE MARKED DURRING THIS HEARING AT JUDGE KARNOW DIRECTION.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY TOOLE JR., WILLIE LIGON-TOOLE, SHAHN AS TO DEFENDANT AUTORETURN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
